text: Now tasks may have `depends_on`, a list of task ids. A task can only run after all its dependencies ran.
Do we assume dependencies reference tasks in the input?
Not necessarily. Missing dependencies should leave the task blocked.
Also blocked. Don't solve classification yet; just tell me what you'd change before coding.
I'd keep the existing selection style for now, but only consider tasks whose dependency ids are already scheduled. If a full pass makes no progress, the remaining tasks are blocked.
